name: Walnut Triangles
recipeInstructions:
-----------------
FROSTING (OPTIONAL):
1. In a bowl, whisk together 1 cup powdered sugar, 1/4 cup softened butter or margarine, and 1 teaspoon vanilla until smooth and creamy.
1. Melt chocolate and butter over low heat. Set aside to cool.
2. Beat eggs for about 5 minutes until light.
3. Gradually add the remaining powdered sugar, salt, vanilla, and milk to the egg mixture, mixing until well combined.
4. Stir in the flour until smooth.
5. Fold in the melted chocolate mixture and chopped walnuts.
6. Grease an 8-inch square baking pan and line it with parchment paper.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes or until set.
9. Allow to cool completely in the pan.
10. Frost the cooled cookies using the frosting mixture, spreading over the surface.
11. Cut the cooled cookies into 2-inch squares.
12. Each square can be cut diagonally into triangles.
Makes approximately 32 cookies.
